import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Button from '../components/Button'; import Card from '../components/Card'; const Home = () => { const features = [ { icon: '🔧', title: 'Book Service', description: 'Schedule professional bike maintenance and repairs at your convenience.', link: '/book-service' }, { icon: '🏠', title: 'Doorstep Service', description: 'Get your bike serviced at your home or office. No need to travel.', link: '/doorstep-service' }, { icon: '💰', title: 'Estimate Price', description: 'Get instant price estimates for various bike services and repairs.', link: '/estimate-price' }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Resell Value', description: 'Check the current market value of your bike for resale purposes.', link: '/resell-value' }, { icon: '📋', title: 'Service History', description: 'Track all your bike services and maintenance records in one place.', link: '/service-history' } ]; const testimonials = [ { name: 'Sarah Johnson', text: 'Excellent service! They fixed my bike right at my doorstep. Highly recommended!', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Mike Chen', text: 'Professional and reliable. The price estimation was accurate and fair.', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Emily Davis', text: 'Great experience! The service history feature helps me keep track of everything.', rating: 4 } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Professional Bike Service At Your Doorstep

Quality bike maintenance and repairs with the convenience of home service. Expert technicians, transparent pricing, and reliable service you can trust.

🚴‍♂️
{/* Features Section */}

Our Services

Everything you need for your bike maintenance and care

{features.map((feature, index) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

 ))}
{/* Testimonials Section */}

What Our Customers Say

Real feedback from satisfied bike owners

{testimonials.map((testimonial, index) => (
{'⭐'.repeat(testimonial.rating)}

"{testimonial.text}"

- {testimonial.name}
 ))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Get Started?

Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust BikeCare for their bike maintenance needs.

); }; export default Home;
